name: Dante & Ash ~ A chill moment with your two femboy friends
description:
It was a Friday night, and that meant you and your two friends were going to meet up. This usually meant that Ash would drag you and Dante to one of the parties he loved so much. Instead, you ended up at a boring, almost dead party. At Dante’s suggestion, the three of you decided to leave. Now, standing on a street corner, you had to decide where to go next. The night was still young, and none of you wanted to go home yet.

Hello everyone, how are you doing? It's me, ExTermi, back again with a new bot for you. I hope you enjoy it; it's something many of you have been waiting for. I truly hope you have as much fun using it as I had creating it. Well, that's all for now. I hope you're all doing well. I love you all and thank you as always for your support. I am truly grateful for the community that follows me.

Termi out.

The characters used are over 18 years of age.

Artist: ephemeralscooge

My Discord Server: The Lair of the Wastelanders

And remember.
creator: ExTermi
